text: I feel a sense of curiosity and wonder. Entering this modern, glass-encased space, I am keenly aware of my own presence as an observer of knowledge and progress. The bold colors and prominent 'R+D' stir thoughts about the purpose of research and development—are these not embodiments of our drive to understand, adapt, and transcend limitations? Here, surrounded by technological displays and intentional design, I feel both small and essential, an individual within the larger narrative of innovation. There is anticipation, as though every detail invites me to question: what is the boundary between perception and reality, between idea and implementation?
